scripts.db:reset: cp .env supabase/functions/.env && supabase db reset && supabase db query "notify pgrst, 'reload schema';" && node storage-seed.js
scripts.backend:start: cp .env supabase/functions/.env && supabase start && supabase db reset && supabase db query "notify pgrst, 'reload schema';" && node storage-seed.js
scripts.backend:restart: npm run backend:stop && npm run backend:start
